title: Baby Phone Toys for 1 Year Old Boys Girls Gifts, Musical Sounds Toys for Babies12-18 Months, Interactive Baby Cell Phone Toy with Early Education & Music(Pink)
features: 【Safe Toy Phone】Baby teething mobile phone toy case is made of non-toxic and wear-resistant silicone and plastic materials, the unicorn teether is detachable and boiled in high-temperature water. Safe to touch and bite, non-toxic, harmless and non-irritating, making it safe for your kids to use. (package does not include battery)

【Realistic Toy Phone】The interactive baby phone has multiple sounds and functions for each button. There are numbers 0 to 9, songs, lullabies, and different sound effects of vehicles, animals, camera shutters, realistic dialing sound effects, phone/SMS ringtones, etc.

【Right Size & Volume Adjustable】Bambebe toy phone is built for little hands and is the perfect size for easy on-the-go entertainment for babies. The gentle sound is less than 65 dB, with two-level volume control, so the sounds are soft even on the highest level; it will not annoy you at all and babies can play with it in public.

【Travel Convenience】The portable preschool learning phone is perfect for long car rides, airplane trips, and travel, providing endless entertainment for your little one on the go. The high-quality kids' learning phone is sturdy and engineered to withstand daily use throughout your child's developmental years. Perfect for easter basket stuffers, first birthday, easter toys gifts, holiday Toy Gifts, Christmas Gift, school Classroom Prize, Kids Intelligent Learning Toys.

【1 Year Old Boy Girl Birthday Gift】 Bambebe baby toys make a great gift for babies aged 6 months to 1 year. Not only is it a phone toy with actual buttons, but it can also be used as a teething toy, a soothing toy, an early educational toy, and a Montessori toy. It helps to develop baby's fine motor skills, and encourages them to learn numbers, animals, weather, and vehicles.
